title: Iran Threatens to Close Strait of Hormuz
detail: IRGC Navy Commander Rear Admiral Alireza Tangsiri warns Iran will 'shut down the Strait of Hormuz to all traffic' if attacked. IRGC conducts live-fire naval exercise in the strait with fast boats, anti-ship missiles, and mine-laying drills. Lloyd's of London raises war-risk insurance premiums for Gulf-bound tankers by 300%.

title: China and Russia Issue Joint Statement Urging Restraint
detail: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi and Russian counterpart Lavrov release joint statement calling US military buildup 'destabilizing' and urging both sides to return to diplomacy. Beijing offers to host emergency talks. Washington dismisses the offer, citing China's continued purchase of Iranian oil in violation of sanctions.
